_comment: Golden Meshtastic Stream-API frames. Byte format verified against the Meshtastic client-API docs (2026-07-01): 0x94 0xC3 <len MSB> <len LSB> <payload>, big-endian length, max 512. Each entry: a payload and its exact wire frame (both hex). Pins StreamFramer.frame() encode + StreamFramer.feed() decode against the spec so a format regression is caught without a radio. Payloads are representative protobuf byte strings; semantic protobuf decode is out of scope for the framer.
